'''Darak Lyll''' was a tall, long-haired and bearded [[Human/Legends|Human]] criminal who lived on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]]. To earn money, Han Solo, on his visit to Alderaan in the year [[10 BBY/Legends|10 BBY]], tried to sell Darak Lyll the glitterstorm charge of the ''[[Ylesian Dream]]''. Lyll declined this, however, because it was reportedly on Alderaan no market for glittering.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Paradise Snare]]'' {{1st}}
